label: TRIVIAL
meaning: Identity flat constant or zero-field branch within stated premises.
retention_rule: Always retain; never discard for lacking structure.

label: REGULAR
meaning: Meets the declared mathematical regularity class on the tested domain.
retention_rule: Retain with the exact class; not automatically physical merit.

label: SINGULAR
meaning: An invariant or field diverges or a required differentiability class fails.
retention_rule: Retain with location order and chart-independence audit.

label: DEGENERATE
meaning: Metric operator Jacobian or leading coefficient loses rank.
retention_rule: Retain as a separate stratum and test alternate variables/charts.

label: HORIZON_OR_CAUSAL_BOUNDARY
meaning: Causal character changes or an optical/coordinate limit occurs.
retention_rule: Retain; do not call a hard edge or failure without global proof.

label: TYPE_CHANGE
meaning: Signature Petrov split rank differential order or other algebraic class changes.
retention_rule: Retain both sides and transition locus.

label: OSCILLATORY
meaning: Fields or invariants oscillate within the registered domain.
retention_rule: Retain frequency/node data without spectrum interpretation.

label: DIVERGENT_BRANCH
meaning: Continuation runs to unbounded field coordinate or parameter behavior.
retention_rule: Retain asymptotics and distinguish physical from coordinate/numerical divergence.

label: DISCONNECTED
meaning: No registered continuation joins the branch to its comparison family.
retention_rule: Retain with search bounds; disconnected is not necessarily complete proof.

label: BIFURCATION_OR_FOLD
meaning: Branch Jacobian or continuation graph has a registered split/turn.
retention_rule: Retain every daughter and zero mode with look-elsewhere accounting.

label: BOUNDARY_CONTROLLED
meaning: Behavior changes materially with boundary class or domain size.
retention_rule: Retain and report dependency; do not promote box behavior.

label: GAUGE_OR_REPRESENTATIVE_ORBIT
meaning: Records are related by coordinate frame or CSN transformation.
retention_rule: Retain one invariant identity plus transformation provenance; do not count as physical multiplicity.

label: UNRESOLVED_NUMERICAL
meaning: Certification tolerance convergence or conditioning is insufficient.
retention_rule: Retain as open evidence; never convert to no solution.

label: SOLVER_FAILURE_OR_BUG_SUSPECT
meaning: Algorithm fails or a likely implementation defect is present.
retention_rule: Retain diagnostic and fix solver before judging metric.

label: TIMEOUT_OR_RESOURCE_BOUND
meaning: Registered compute limit reached without classification.
retention_rule: Retain checkpoint and throughput limit; not negative physics.

label: NO_GLOBAL_COMPLETION_FOUND_WITHIN_BOUNDS
meaning: Local branch failed all enumerated global joins within a frozen search.
retention_rule: Retain exact bounds/premises; never state unconditional nonexistence.
